Clone the DeepSpeedExamples repository or ensure access to the 'autotuning/hf/gpt2-xl/test_tune.sh' script from https://github.com/microsoft/DeepSpeedExamples/blob/ff9a0234cf22dd9af03c7aa8037fb9143adca6/training/autotuning/hf/gpt2-xl/test_tune.sh
Create a clean working directory at ~/test and change into it
Clone the HuggingFace transformers repository with 'git clone https://github.com/huggingface/transformers.git' and install it using 'pip install .' inside the cloned transformers directory
Install DeepSpeed in the test environment using 'pip install deepspeed' (include any additional dependencies required by the test script)
Create a new file named 'test_tune.sh' in the test directory and copy the exact contents of the referenced test_tune.sh script into it
Modify the 'HF_PATH' environment variable inside 'test_tune.sh' to '../' to point to the transformers repo correctly
Set the 'NGPUS' environment variable to 6 inside 'test_tune.sh' to match the available 6 GPUs (NVIDIA 3070 Ti cards)
Ensure the test environment has passwordless SSH access to localhost configured, or note that SSH permission errors might occur but are not required to reproduce the ParquetConfig error
Run the script with './test_tune.sh tune' and observe the output logs for initialization messages from DeepSpeed and the autotuner

Monitor the script execution until it reaches the model profiling stage where the error occurs, specifically after 'Starting model info profile run.' and before or during DeepSpeed autotuning experiments
Validate that the error 'ParquetConfig.__init__() got an unexpected keyword argument 'token'' is raised and printed in the logs with the traceback pointing to autotuner or DeepSpeed internals
Confirm that the error happens reproducibly without any code modifications except environment variables and script path adjustments
No model training or successful tuning runs should occur; the script should terminate or skip tuning due to this initialization error
Capture the exact error message and stack trace for verification
